case_title: ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC VS. JAVIER VELAZQUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SELIKOVITZ, MOSHE SUBSTITUTED FOR SERAFANO, DONALD B AS ATTORNEY FOR ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-02-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VELAZQUEZ, JAVIER AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-07-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-26-2007
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-07-2007 CONTINUED TO FEB-22-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-02-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-22-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
